Name: Shuffle
Effect: Cycles through open tabs in Chrome window.

Name: Hard Refresh
Effect: Use to clear the css cache and reload the window.

Name: Dev Tools
Effect: Opens the Chrome Developer Tools; the equivalent of: right-click on a browser page and select 'inspect' from the drop-down.

Name: Bookmark Tabs
Effect: Saves all the open tabs of a Chrome window to a new bookmark folder.
